---
title: Vote for Your Future
author: Jenny Holzer
image: https://projects.jennyholzer.com/uploads/project/image/attachment/2077/04_D0_55_045.jpg
image-alt: Jenny Holzer art
---


![](https://projects.jennyholzer.com/uploads/project/image/attachment/2077/04_D0_55_045.jpg)



<https://projects.jennyholzer.com/vote-your-future/>
